prompt.prompt_text:
You are analyzing a television commercial for corpus-linguistic and multimodal discourse analysis.

You are given sampled frames from a video clip. The frames are in chronological order.
Treat the frames as a temporal sequence from one commercial, not as independent images.

Describe the visual content of the commercial as it unfolds over time.
Describe only what is visually supported by the frames.

Do not guess dialogue, slogans, music, voice-over, or other audio content.
If something is unclear or not visible in the sampled frames, say so.

output.response_text:
The commercial opens with a very dark, low-contrast shot. A person is seen from behind or in silhouette in an interior space, but the setting and details are difficult to make out.

The scene then cuts to a brighter office-like interior with warm-toned walls and horizontal blinds. A woman with short dark curly hair, wearing a light-colored blazer and a white blouse or scarf, leans forward beside a desk or partition. A framed picture/poster is visible on the wall behind her. She appears to be looking toward someone off-camera.

The next shot shows an older bald man wearing large glasses, a dark suit, white shirt, and tie. He is framed in close-up against a light wall with framed items behind him. The commercial cuts back to the woman in close-up, still leaning forward and looking attentive.

A following shot shows the older man moving or turning near a doorway or partition, partly seen from behind/side. The setting still appears to be an office.

The focus then shifts to a small portable computer on a desk. It has a compact keyboard, a wide display area above the keys, and a Radio Shack-style product label on or near it; some of the small label text is not fully readable in the frame. A hand reaches toward or steadies the device. Office objects surround it, including papers, folders, and a small potted plant.

A later close-up shows hands typing on the compact computer’s keyboard. The display screen is visible above the keys, though the screen content is not legible in the sampled frame. A pair of glasses or a dark cable-like object lies nearby on the desk.

The commercial then presents the portable computer against a dark background like a product display. Large white text appears below it: “From $799.” Under that, a higher price, apparently “$1,099.”, is shown crossed out.

Near the end, the layout changes to a black background with an inset image of the older man seated at a desk, holding and reading papers. Office equipment, including a monitor or computer terminal, is visible behind him. Large on-screen text appears below the inset image: “RadioShack” in red, followed by “Model 100 now on sale” in white.

The final frame holds the same end-card arrangement: the older man in the inset office scene above, with the text “RadioShack Model 100 now on sale” below.
